message:
fix(verifier_sdk): bind claim evidence_refs to provided evidence_ids (bd-1z5a.21, bd-141tb)

verify_claim() and validate_bundle() now enforce that every declared
evidence_ref matches a provided evidence_id, and every evidence item
is declared in evidence_refs. Prevents unverified evidence from being
silently accepted or declared evidence from being omitted.

3 regression tests added, 7891 lib tests pass (extended-surfaces).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
